query: UPDATE providers SET name = $1, endpoint = $2, cloud_region = $3, cloud_project = $4, deployment = $5, api_version = $6, auth_mode = $7, connector_ready = $8, active_credential_version_id = $9, state = 'draft'::provider_state, etag = $10, updated_at = now(), last_probe_at = NULL, last_probe_status = NULL, last_probe_detail = NULL WHERE id = $11
